text:
Once upon a time in a quiet forest, there lived a friendly fox named Freddy. Freddy had a favorite berry bush by the stream, where he'd sunbathe and sing to the birds. His world was simple yet complete. One day, while dancing around and humming his favorite tune, a little breeze stirred the leaves.

A tiny, sparkling drop of dew fell from the leaf above, rolling down to Freddy's nose. Instantly, his tail twitched and his ears perked up. He followed the path the drop had made, which led him to a hidden glade. There he found something that had never existed in his woodland home—the first-ever bottle cap.

Curiously, he placed the cap on a stump, where it seemed to magnetically stick. He thought it odd, almost magical. Freddy's fox friends, Chip and Dale, were nearby when Freddy discovered it. They were silent for a moment, considering their friend's find.

"Maybe it's a treasure map?" Dale
